personal.preferred_title: Principal AI / Machine Learning Data Engineer

summary: Senior Data Engineer and AI practitioner with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building production data pipelines, telemetry platforms, and cloud data systems in regulated environments. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, PySpark, AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, Airflow, Docker, CI/CD, data quality, observability, and governance. Built AI-enabled data workflows including GenAI Text-to-SQL, RAG-style job matching, semantic duplicate detection, and ML forecasting pipelines using Prophet and scikit-learn. Trusted to translate ambiguous business and security needs into scalable technical roadmaps, reusable frameworks, and executive-ready analytics.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected production Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, replacing legacy manual processes with automated, repeatable data workflows for capacity analytics and risk forecasting.

Built hybrid AWS and Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Redshift, and Oracle schemas to support large-scale telemetry processing, historical retention, and ML forecasting workloads.
Developed Prophet and scikit-learn forecasting models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead with 90%+ accuracy, improving provisioning lead time and executive decision-making.
Migrated heavy forecasting workloads from on-prem Oracle to Redshift and cloud-scale processing patterns, enabling parallel execution and better performance for large telemetry datasets.
Integrated monitoring feeds from BMC TrueSight, CA Wily, and AppDynamics into unified reporting pipelines with validation, reconciliation, dashboards, and alert-oriented operational visibility.

Applied governance, access control, and sensitive-data handling practices in a regulated banking environment, supporting auditability, compliance expectations, and confidentiality of operational data.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical hospitality systems, improving visibility into user experience, transaction paths, and service reliability.
Led the FAST project, mining real-user and synthetic performance metrics from Gomez and Dynatrace data to surface optimization recommendations adopted by engineering teams.
Upgraded Dynatrace from 6.5 to 7.0 and enforced TLS 1.2 security with zero regression in production monitoring coverage during cutover.
Integrated HP Performance Center with Dynatrace, enabling load-test telemetry correlation across application, infrastructure, and user-experience signals.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as CA APM SME for a large financial services environment, managing 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000 to 6,000 instrumented agents across enterprise applications.
Designed dashboards, alerts, SLA thresholds, and Management Modules that became monitoring standards across client environments.
Built Perl and Ksh data-extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports and improving operational consistency.
Led large-scale CA APM upgrades with zero unplanned downtime while coordinating engineering, operations, and customer stakeholders.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput shopping engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster, supporting transaction volume described as 10x VISA scale.
Optimized core transaction processing using C++ and OCCI, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.
Built C++/OCCI/OCI validation frameworks to verify migration correctness across millions of transaction records and phased cutover activity.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed high-availability multithreaded C++ billing interfaces using POSIX threads, mutexes, semaphores, socket programming, and Marconi APIs for telecom billing workloads.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing processes by reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance through sequence optimization.
Reverse-engineered undocumented AMDOCS APIs and built integration documentation to support interface delivery across billing, settlement, and reporting workflows.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, PL/SQL
skills.Data Engineering: ETL / ELT, PySpark, Apache Spark, AWS Glue, S3, Athena, Redshift, Data Warehousing, Data Modeling, Apache Parquet, JSON, ingestion frameworks, parsing, enrichment, reconciliation
skills.AI / ML: GenAI workflows, RAG-style retrieval, Text-to-SQL agents, ML forecasting, Prophet, scikit-learn, feature preparation, telemetry analysis, predictive analytics, model enablement
skills.Cloud / Platforms: AWS, ECS, EC2, Docker, Airflow, Git, GitHub Actions, Linux/Unix, Databricks study, Delta Lake study, Snowflake study
skills.Quality / Governance / Security: Data quality, pipeline validation, observability, alerting, SLA/SLO mindset, metadata, lineage concepts, access control, regulated data handling, encryption, PII/PHI-aware practices
skills.Monitoring / Observability: BMC TrueSight / TSCO, Dynatrace AppMon, Synthetic Monitoring, EUM/RUM, CA APM / Introscope, AppDynamics, transaction tracing, dashboards, thresholds, operational reporting

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers. The system performs semantic duplicate detection, job scoring, resume and cover letter tailoring, quality gates, and application tracking with RAG-style retrieval and structured generation.

projects.name: HorizonScale AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced manual forecasting cycles with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine using Python, PySpark, Prophet, scikit-learn, and Streamlit. Produced capacity bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead and delivered executive-ready utilization insights from banking-scale telemetry data.

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless data platform using S3, AWS Glue, Athena, Redshift, and Bedrock. Built GenAI Text-to-SQL capabilities with Claude 3 Sonnet and optimized lakehouse storage patterns using Parquet and Snappy compression.
